title: Madras High Court dismisses DMK MP’s plea for ED probe against BJP’s Nainar Nagendran
description: The Madras High Court on Tuesday dismissed a plea filed by DMK Rajya Sabha MP R Girirajan seeking a direction to the Enforcement Directorate (ED) to probe BJP leader Nainar Nagendran in a cash-for-votes case [Girirajan v. State of Tamil Nadu].A Bench of Chief Justice SA Dharmadikari and Justice Arul Murugan passed the verdict.A copy of the judgment is yet to be made available. Girirajan had alleged that the ED failed to act under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA), 2002. He termed the
